title: Automated Reporting Pipeline
description: Replace manual spreadsheet work with automated data pipelines that pull, clean, and visualize your KPIs in real-time dashboards — so your team focuses on decisions, not data entry.

title: E-Commerce Product Scraper
description: Automatically collect product data from Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom stores into a unified database — enabling competitive analysis, pricing intelligence, and catalog management at scale.

title: Smart Workflow Automation
description: Connect your existing tools into intelligent workflows that assign tasks, sync data across platforms, and trigger actions based on custom rules — eliminating bottlenecks and manual hand-offs.

title: AI Content Processing
description: Automatically process, filter, and curate content from dozens of sources using AI — from news article pitching to subtitle generation, turning hours of manual work into minutes.

title: Business Intelligence Dashboards
description: Transform raw business data into interactive dashboards with real-time KPIs, trend analysis, and anomaly detection — giving leadership clear visibility into performance across every department.

title: Social Media Messaging Automation
description: Automatically respond to social media messages using custom responses or AI-generated responses — saving time and ensuring consistent customer interactions.

title: Daily Email Reports
description: Automatically generate and send daily reports to your team using custom responses or AI-generated responses — saving time and ensuring consistent customer interactions.

title: NFC Customer Redirect
description: Let visitors tap their phone on an NFC tag to instantly land on your website or promo page — no QR scanning, no typing URLs, just a simple swipe for frictionless engagement.

title: E-Commerce Automated Client Emailing
description: Engineered an aesthetically sophisticated HTML email system that automates personalized stock updates, ensuring a premium brand experience while maintaining data alignment for clients.
